footer.tagline: International tutoring for ambitious students. Connecting globally minded learners with top-tier educators worldwide.

home.hero_subtitle: Personalized tutoring for children, students, and professionals worldwide. Flexible tutoring in Japanese, English, exams, and international curricula.
home.about_p1: Petra Tutors connects students from all countries with top-tier educators from leading universities worldwide. We believe in personalized, culturally aware education that adapts to each student's unique goals and learning style.
home.about_p2: Whether you need in-person support, online sessions, or a hybrid approach, our network provides flexible, premium education without the rigid structure of traditional cram schools.
home.prog_lang_desc: Comprehensive support for Japanese and English language acquisition, from beginners to business proficiency.
home.prog_exam_desc: Targeted preparation for IB, A-Level, AP, standardized tests, and university admissions coaching.
home.prog_intl_desc: Dedicated support for students navigating international schools and global academic standards.
home.step1_desc: Share your goals through our form to book your free 30-minute trial lesson.
home.step2_desc: We carefully select a tutor from our international network who best fits your academic needs and learning style.
home.step3_desc: Begin your personalized lessons online, at home, or in a cafe, with a flexible schedule that works for you.
home.pricing_sub: Simple plans with no admission fees.
home.final_desc: Connect with an international tutor today. We will reply with a recommended tutor and lesson plan.

about.title: About Petra Tutors
about.subtitle: Connecting ambitious minds across borders.
about.s1_desc: Petra Tutors is an international tutoring network connecting students with tutors from leading universities worldwide.
about.s2_desc: Help students develop knowledge, communication, and confidence across cultures.
about.s4_desc: Petra connects students across cultures and education systems, breaking down academic barriers to create a truly global classroom.

no_fee.title: Transparent Pricing
no_fee.subtitle: Premium education shouldn't start with a penalty. We believe in accessible excellence.
no_fee.explanation: Many tutoring institutions and cram schools charge exorbitant admission fees between ¥10,000–¥30,000 just to enroll. Petra Tutors charges absolutely no admission fee.
no_fee.b2: Flexible lesson plans that adapt to you
no_fee.b3: Pay only for the lessons you take

tutors.title: Meet Our Tutors
tutors.subtitle: A curated network of exceptional educators from top universities worldwide.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Premium education tailored to your goals. Our simple starting rates ensure you get the exact expertise you need. Every inquiry includes a free 30-minute trial lesson.
pricing.p1_desc: Conversational practice, grammar basics, and JLPT/EIKEN fundamentals for all ages.
pricing.p2_desc: Targeted support for school subjects, GPA management, and domestic curriculums.
pricing.p3_desc: Specialized international school support and challenging curriculum tracking.
pricing.p4_desc: Expert guidance for IB Diploma, university admissions, and elite essay crafting.
pricing.note_desc: The prices listed are starting rates. Final pricing depends on the specific lesson format (online vs. in-person), location, and the background/expertise of your perfectly matched tutor.
pricing.no_fee_link: Learn about our No Admission Fee policy →

programs.title: Our Programs
programs.subtitle: Expert-led, personalized tutoring designed to help you excel. Book your free 30-minute trial lesson today.
programs.custom_title: Don't see exactly what you need?
programs.custom_desc: We can customize a learning plan specifically for your unique goals.

inquiry.title: Let's start your journey
inquiry.subtitle: Tell us about your learning goals to book your free 30-minute trial lesson. We'll guide you through the next steps to finding the perfect international tutor.
inquiry.n1: We review your inquiry and book your 30-min free trial.
inquiry.n2: We'll send you a detailed form to confirm your availability and specific needs.
inquiry.n3: We'll consult with you to recommend the perfect tutor match.
inquiry.name: Full Name
inquiry.subject: Subject of Interest
inquiry.subject_ph: Ex. IB History, Business English, AP Math
inquiry.goal_ph: Briefly describe what you want to achieve or any specific tutor preferences...
inquiry.success_desc: Thank you for reaching out to Petra Tutors. Our tutoring success team will review your inquiry and reply shortly with the next steps in our matching process.
inquiry.reassurance: We will review your inquiry and get in touch with the next steps.
